content.en:
Next, Ye Tian first refined the materials of these three formulas, and then used these materials to cultivate.

In this way, familiarize yourself with the mysteries of these three formulations.

After a period of time, Ye Tian completed the first life recasting.

In fact, his current cultivation has not yet reached the time to carry out life reforgment, and doing so will affect the foundation.

However, this replica body is meant to be tried, so naturally there is no need to care about the foundation.

After trying again and again, Ye Tian gradually understood the specific defects of these formulas, and then he had to erase these defects and improve the formula step by step.

So, Ye Tian began to refine the formula.

However, it was very unsmooth at the beginning, not only did the formula not be perfected, but the sequelae of the new formula were even greater, or even a complete failure.

But Ye Tian did not fail every time, and there were times when he succeeded in perfecting.

As long as it is perfected once, it is progress, and after progress again and again, the formula is naturally getting better and better.

It's just that this method consumes too much resources, and Ye Tian has a lot of wealth and different silver sand, otherwise he really can't support such consumption.

"The creation of each formula is the sacrifice of countless resources and a large number of Great Ancestors, and it is no wonder that those big forces are unwilling to publish the formula, or even strictly control it. "

Ye Tian muttered.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of realms have passed.

After such a long time, Ye Tian didn't know how much different silver sand he consumed, but in the end, he really allowed Ye Tian to perfect and create a complete formula.

The reason why it is a complete formula is not that Ye Tian successfully relied on this formula to break through to a high-level immeasurable life form, but that when he was recasting his life again and again, he did not find any drawbacks at all.

That's the standard for a complete formula!

"This recipe is called the Silver Dragon Formula!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This recipe requires a total of twenty-eight ingredients, of which the main ingredient is isosilver sand, and it is a large amount of isosilver sand.

This recipe requires ten times as much isosilver sand as other ingredients, and several precious ingredients are exchanged.

Overall, this recipe is several times more expensive than those few incomplete recipes, and the demand for isosilver sand is too high.

Although he has not seen other complete formulas, he also feels that his formula should be general in terms of resource utilization, and it is a formula that wastes resources.

Of course, he can still refine it to create a better recipe, but it will take a long time.

"Forget it, if you can successfully create this silver dragon formula, just use this recipe to practice, anyway, I don't lack different silver sand, I don't care about this resource consumption!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, he refined a batch of Silver Dragon formula materials, also known as Silver Dragon Gold!

He hadn't reached the level of using Silver Dragon Gold yet, he needed to raise his cultivation to the limit of a mid-level immeasurable lifeform before using Silver Dragon Gold.

In this way, the potential can be maximized.

If you use Silver Dragon Gold to complete the life reforge now, although you can also break through to the realm of high-level immeasurable lifeforms, your future achievements will not be high, and it will be difficult to rise to the level of invincibility at the level of high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

Thereupon.

In the following years, Ye Tian focused on collecting a large number of resources that would help improve his cultivation to improve his cultivation, and he was also trying to acquire some resources that could improve his immeasurable will.

But his immeasurable will is high, and the resources that are useful to him are too few.

But no matter what, he is still slowly improving, and that's enough!

this day.

When Ye Tian was looking for the Alien Silver Sand in the Voidless Galaxy, he suddenly found another material.

This material was mixed in these heterosilver sand when he found a piece of foreign silver sand, the quantity was extremely rare, only more than a thousand grains, and the appearance was very much like golden sand grains.

These are also sand, similar to the Isosilver Sand, but the energy contained inside is more than ten times greater than the Isosilver Sand.

"This should be the same material as Heterosilver Sand, but it works better!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He also knew it had to be something better, so he collected it.

"If the silver sand is fused, will it be able to fuse into this golden sand?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he tried it himself, and it really fused.

However, until he knew what it was used for, he would not use it.

Moreover, the recipe he created, the Silver Dragon Formula, uses Alien Silver Sand, and if it uses Golden Sand, it should fail.

......

The capital of hurricanes, the remnants of the Ghost Capital Mountain.

Ye Tian came here again, and he found that he had never heard of golden sand similar to the foreign silver sand when he was asking around, and it seemed that there was no information about this at all.

Therefore, he can only come here to understand the situation.

"Sell items!"

After Ye Tian entered the Remnant Heaven Pavilion, he said.

The woman who received Ye Tian was still the same as last time, but when Ye Tian was a grain of golden sand, the woman was shocked.

Soon, the Pavilion Master of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion, that is, the high-level immeasurable lifeform, came.

"Xuanming Great Ancestor, meet again!"

The Lord of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion, Fengyin Great Ancestor, said with a smile.

"Fengyin Great Ancestor, I didn't expect you to come again for the sale of this thing!" Ye Tian smiled and said: "To be honest, I don't know what kind of item this is, I got it by accident, can you tell me what this is?"

Fengyin Great Ancestor smiled and said, "You should get more than one of these things, right? Could it be to understand the usefulness of this item? If you are willing to sell enough of this item, I can tell you the value of this item for free, how about it?"

"I only have more than a hundred!"

Ye Tian said casually.

"More than a hundred, okay!" Fengyin Great Ancestor was overjoyed.

Immediately, Ye Tian made a deal with the Remnant Heaven Pavilion.

And the value of a hundred grains of golden sand was actually comparable to the value of a million different silver sands, which made Ye Tian stunned.

This is equivalent to a grain of golden sand that can be exchanged for 10,000 different silver sand, and when he fused, he only used 100 different silver sand to fuse a grain of golden sand.

After the transaction was completed, Fengyin Dazu revealed: "This sand is called Isoginsha, and some places that produce Isoginsand have a very low probability of giving birth to a small amount of Isoginsha. But in fact, ninety percent of the silver sand treasures do not exist in such treasures as different golden sands. Compared with Yiyinsha, Yijinsha is not only higher in energy, but also has one more effect, that is, stability. For example, after the mid-level immeasurable lifeform has completed nine reforges, it cannot continue to be refined, and it has to attack the high-level immeasurable lifeforms. The reason why the tenth reforge could not be continued was that it was unstable after the forcible reforge. And what is refined with the Isojinsha recipe can be reforged for the tenth time. Of course, it must be from the first time you reforge your life to use the Isojinsha formula! But the number of Isojinsha is too small, so the major forces have no way to use the Isojinsha formula in large quantities, and at most cultivating one or two Great Ancestors is the limit!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.
